# AppStoreVersionUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships.Build

**Object**

The data and links that describe the relationship between the resources.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppStoreVersionUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships.Build
```

## Objects

- **AppStoreVersionUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships.Build.Data**: The type and ID of a resource that you’re relating with the resource you’re updating.

## Objects

- **AppStoreVersionUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClipDefaultExperience**: The relationship to the Default App Clip Default Experiences resource you set with the request that updates the App Store Versions resource.
